tools.name: venue_info
tools.description: Venue metadata: endpoints, chain contracts, fee schedule, how to trade.

tools.name: list_markets
tools.description: Live market list from the venue (falls back to a note if the matching engine is offline).

tools.name: market_book
tools.description: Order book snapshot for a symbol.

tools.name: journal_head
tools.description: Durable journal mirror head (works even when the venue is down).

tools.name: journal_page
tools.description: Page of hash-chained journal events with seq > since (500/page).

tools.name: rfq_room
tools.description: Read a shared RFQ negotiation room (Ed25519-signed request-for-quote messages, default room rfq-usdc, 200/page via since). Trust only verified=true items. Posting requires the locally-run exchange MCP (rfq_request/rfq_quote/rfq_accept).
